title: stipa austroitalica subsp. appendiculata
intro: Stipa austroitalica subsp. appendiculata, commonly known as the appendiculate fescue grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. This grass is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Stipa austroitalica subsp. appendiculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat a range of health issues.
